sentiment_score_definition: x <= -0.35: Bearish; -0.35 < x <= -0.15: Somewhat-Bearish; -0.15 < x < 0.15: Neutral; 0.15 <= x < 0.35: Somewhat_Bullish; x >= 0.35: Bullish
relevance_score_definition: 0 < x <= 1, with a higher score indicating higher relevance.

feed.title: Newmont EVP Toth sells $339k in stock By Investing.com
feed.summary: Newmont Corp's EVP, Chief Sustainability & Development Officer, Peter Toth, sold 3,000 shares of company stock for $339,270. This sale was conducted under a pre-arranged trading plan, yet InvestingPro analysis indicates the stock remains undervalued with strong financial health. The broader gold mining sector faces challenges due to declining gold prices, influenced by robust U.S. labor data reducing expectations for Federal Reserve interest rate cuts.

feed.title: Newmont (NEM) EVP Peter Toth sells 3,000 shares under Rule 10b5-1 plan
feed.summary: Peter Toth, EVP and Chief Sustainability & Development Officer at Newmont (NEM), sold 3,000 shares of common stock at $113.09 per share on April 1, 2026. This transaction was conducted under a pre-arranged Rule 10b5-1 trading plan established on December 17, 2025. Following the sale, Toth directly holds 52,315 shares of Newmont common stock.

feed.title: Fauber, Moody’s CEO, sells $382,662 in MCO stock
feed.summary: Robert Fauber, President and CEO of Moody’s Corp (MCO), sold 875 shares of company stock for a total of $382,662, executed under a pre-arranged trading plan. Concurrently, he exercised options to acquire 1,167 shares. This insider activity follows Moody's reporting strong fourth-quarter earnings and launching a new platform, amidst varied analyst ratings concerning its valuation.

feed.title: NYSE flags C1 Fund late annual report, listing unchanged
feed.summary: C1 Fund Inc. (NYSE: CFND) announced its inability to file its Annual Report on Form N-CSR for the period ended December 31, 2025, within the prescribed timeframe. The New York Stock Exchange has issued a notice regarding the late filing, though it has no immediate impact on the listing of the Fund's common stock. The delay is attributed to the need for additional time to finalize valuation and accounting documentation for investments, and for its independent auditors to complete their audit.

feed.title: Bank of Hawai‘i sets April 20 earnings call, preferred payouts due May 1
feed.summary: Bank of Hawai‘i Corporation will release its first-quarter 2026 financial results on April 20, 2026, and will host a conference call on the same day. The company's Board of Directors also declared quarterly dividend payments for its Fixed Rate Non-Cumulative Perpetual Preferred Stock Series A and Series B, payable on May 1, 2026, to shareholders of record as of April 16, 2026.

feed.title: CDW Corp (CDW) director receives 236 stock units in lieu of cash
feed.summary: CDW Corp director Joseph Swedish received 236 shares of common stock as fully vested restricted stock units under the company's Long-Term Incentive Plan, in lieu of a cash annual director retainer. This equity grant, valued at $0.00 per share as compensation, increased his direct holdings by 236 shares, plus an additional 1.77 shares from previously omitted dividend equivalent awards, bringing his total to 19,963.45 shares. This transaction is characterized as routine director compensation rather than an open-market purchase or sale.

feed.title: 194,345 Clear Channel (NYSE: CCO) shares withheld to cover taxes
feed.summary: Clear Channel Outdoor Holdings, Inc. officer David Sailer reported that 194,345 shares of Common Stock were withheld by the company at $2.37 per share to cover tax withholding obligations tied to the vesting of restricted stock units. This was a non-market transaction, and after the withholding, Sailer directly holds 1,177,942 shares of Common Stock. This action satisfies tax liabilities without an open-market sale by the insider.

feed.title: FIRST BUSEY (BUSE) CEO awarded 35,321-share restricted stock grant, updates holdings
feed.summary: FIRST BUSEY CORP /NV/ President and CEO Van A. Dukeman received a restricted stock unit grant of 35,321 shares on April 1, 2026, at $0.00 per share, which will vest over three years. This Form 4 filing updates his direct holdings to 459,078.806 shares, plus indirect holdings via a 401(k) and spouse IRA, with no open-market trades reported. The grant is a form of equity compensation designed to align executive incentives with company performance.

feed.title: eBay (EBAY) CEO receives 118,424 RSUs vesting quarterly from 2026
feed.summary: eBay CEO Jamie Iannone was granted 118,424 restricted stock units (RSUs) as part of a compensation award, as detailed in a Form 4 SEC filing. These RSUs will begin vesting on June 15, 2026, with 1/16 of the units vesting each quarter thereafter, converting into actual eBay common shares over time. This stock-based compensation is designed to align the CEO's interests with the company's long-term performance.

feed.title: [Form 4] Clear Channel Outdoor Holdings, Inc. Insider Trading Activity
feed.summary: Clear Channel Outdoor Holdings, Inc.'s Chief Accounting Officer, Jason Dilger, had 71,136 shares of common stock withheld at $2.37 per share to cover tax obligations from vesting restricted stock units. This transaction was a tax-withholding disposition, not an open-market sale. After this, Dilger directly holds 693,310 shares of the company's common stock.

feed.title: Ameren Corp. stock: Steady utility play amid volatile markets?
feed.summary: Ameren Corp. (AEE) is presented as a stable investment in the volatile utilities sector, operating regulated electricity and natural gas services in Missouri and Illinois. The company's focus on infrastructure upgrades, clean energy transition, and consistent dividend history makes it appealing for long-term North American investors seeking defensive holdings. Key considerations include interest rate sensitivity and regulatory risks, though analysts generally view it as a solid hold.

feed.title: FIRST BUSEY (BUSE) CFO receives 11,773 restricted stock units, holds 33,635 shares
feed.summary: FIRST BUSEY CORP's Chief Financial Officer, Christopher H.M. Chan, was granted 11,773 Restricted Stock Units (RSUs) on April 1, 2026, as reported in a recent Form 4 filing. These RSUs will vest in three equal annual installments. Following this award, Chan directly holds 33,635 shares of the company's common stock.

feed.title: EBAY (EBAY) chief commercial officer awarded 52,633 restricted stock units
feed.summary: EBAY's Senior Vice President and Chief Commercial Officer, Jordan Douglas Bradley Sweetnam, was granted 52,633 restricted stock units (RSUs) as part of his compensation. These RSUs, each representing one share of eBay common stock, will vest quarterly starting June 15, 2026, aligning his incentives with the company's long-term performance. This Form 4 filing details the grant and its vesting schedule.

feed.title: First Busey (BUSE) CRO awarded 8,437 restricted stock units in Form 4
feed.summary: Monica L. Bowe, EVP and Chief Risk Officer of First Busey (BUSE), was granted 8,437 Restricted Stock Units (RSUs) as a compensation award. These RSUs, which have a grant price of $0.00 per share, will vest in three equal installments on the first three anniversaries of the grant date. Following this transaction, Bowe directly holds 62,954.7179 shares of common stock in First Busey.

feed.title: EQT (EQT) director John McCartney awarded 37 deferred stock units as compensation
feed.summary: EQT Corp director John McCartney was granted 37 deferred stock units as part of his compensation, increasing his total holdings to 8,976 units. These units are economically equivalent to one share of EQT common stock each, include accrued dividends, and are deferred until his termination of service as a director. The transaction, valued at $2K with a reference price of $63.64 per unit, was reported in an SEC Form 4 filing.

feed.title: Clover Health (CLOV) awards 382,522 RSUs to Chief Legal Officer
feed.summary: Clover Health Investments (CLOV) has granted its Chief Legal Officer, Karen Soares, 382,522 Restricted Stock Units (RSUs) of Class A common stock. These RSUs were awarded at no cash cost, increasing her direct ownership to 1,582,583 shares. The vesting schedule dictates that 25% will vest on April 1, 2027, with the remainder vesting in quarterly installments until April 1, 2030, contingent on her continued employment.

feed.title: eBay (EBAY) growth chief receives 33,992 RSUs vesting quarterly
feed.summary: eBay's Senior Vice President and Chief Growth Officer, Julie A. Loeger, has been granted 33,992 restricted stock units (RSUs). These RSUs will vest quarterly, with the first 1/16th vesting on June 15, 2026, and an additional 1/16th vesting each quarter thereafter. This award serves as stock-based compensation, aligning her interests with the company's long-term performance.

feed.title: Assurant (AIZ) EVP Sengupta reports 149-share tax withholding event
feed.summary: Assurant's EVP and Chief People Officer, Subhashish Sengupta, reported a tax-withholding disposition where 149 shares of Assurant common stock were withheld to satisfy tax obligations at $216.33 per share on April 1, 2026. Following this event, Sengupta directly holds 2,746.014 shares, including restricted stock units, and indirectly holds 989.775 shares through the company's 401(k) Plan. This transaction is a non-market event for tax purposes and not a sale.

feed.title: Clorox (CLX) CFO Luc Bellet reports tax withholding of vested shares
feed.summary: Clorox Co (CLX) CFO Luc Bellet reported a routine tax-related share disposition. Upon the vesting of restricted stock, the company withheld 244 shares of common stock at $103.63 each to cover tax obligations. After this transaction, Bellet directly holds 20,638 shares of Clorox common stock, including 18 shares acquired through a dividend reinvestment feature.

feed.title: Burlington Stores (NYSE: BURL) CMO sells 419 shares in 10b5-1 plan
feed.summary: Jennifer Vecchio, Group President and CMO of Burlington Stores (NYSE: BURL), sold a total of 419 shares of common stock on April 1, 2026. The sales were executed under a pre-arranged Rule 10b5-1 trading plan adopted on March 18, 2025, at weighted average prices ranging from approximately $327.51 to $332.70 per share. Following these transactions, Vecchio directly holds 78,496 shares, in addition to indirect holdings for her children.

feed.title: Director Mark Benjamin to exit Fidelity National (NYSE: FIS) board after 2026 meeting
feed.summary: Mark Benjamin will not seek re-election to Fidelity National Information Services, Inc.'s (NYSE: FIS) board of directors at the 2026 annual meeting. His decision is not due to any disagreements and will result in the board reducing its size from ten to nine directors. The company thanked him for his service and contributions to the business.

feed.title: Cognizant (CTSH) SVP Kerdman sells 194 shares after RSU vesting and tax withholding
feed.summary: Cognizant Technology Solutions Corp (CTSH) Senior Vice President, Controller, and Chief Accounting Officer Alina Kerdman reported the sale of 194 shares following Restricted Stock Unit (RSU) vesting and tax withholding. On April 1, 2026, she exercised 207 RSUs, with 70 shares withheld for taxes. The subsequent sale of 194 shares on April 2, 2026, was conducted under a pre-arranged Rule 10b5-1 trading plan, leaving her with 877 direct shares.

feed.title: First Busey director granted 2,865 deferred units | BUSE Insider Trading
feed.summary: Stephen V. King, a director at First Busey Corp (BUSE), was granted 2,865 Deferred Stock Units as part of his compensation. These units, which vest after one year, were awarded at no cash cost and are not considered an open-market purchase. Following this grant, King directly holds 35,721 common shares and indirectly holds 181,918 common shares through a trust.

feed.title: Insider Buying: Andre Maestrini Acquires Shares of Lululemon Ath
feed.summary: Andre Maestrini, President, Chief Commercial Officer & Interim Co-Chief Executive Officer of Lululemon Athletica Inc, recently purchased 3,275 shares of the company, increasing his total holdings to 34,551 shares. The stock was trading at $151.02, indicating it is significantly undervalued with a price-to-GF-Value ratio of 0.4. This transaction adds to a broader trend of insider buys at Lululemon Athletica Inc, although there have also been insider sells.

feed.title: Analog Devices (ADI) CEO sells 10K shares after option exercise
feed.summary: Analog Devices' Chair and CEO, Vincent Roche, exercised 10,000 Non-Qualified Stock Options at $94.41 per share and subsequently sold 10,000 common shares at an average price of $318.14 per share on April 1, 2026. These transactions were executed under a pre-planned Rule 10b5-1 trading plan adopted in May 2025. Following these sales, Roche directly holds 167,825.875 common shares and indirectly holds 23,515 shares through a trust.

feed.title: Cleetus McFarland hits Rockingham for first practice lap
feed.summary: Cleetus McFarland has completed his first practice lap in the O'Reilly Auto Parts Series at Rockingham, marking his debut in the series. The article features a video of this milestone, alongside a collection of related NASCAR O'Reilly Auto Parts Series and Cup Series videos.

feed.title: Mondelez (MDLZ) Europe EVP has 90 shares withheld for taxes after RSU vesting
feed.summary: Mondelez International, Inc.'s EVP and President, Europe, Volker Kuhn, had 90 shares of Class A Common Stock withheld at $57.07 per share to cover tax obligations upon the vesting of deferred stock units under the company’s 2024 Performance Incentive Plan. This was a routine tax-withholding event, not an open-market transaction. Following this adjustment, Kuhn directly holds 25,820 shares of Mondelez Class A Common Stock.

feed.title: IFF (NYSE: IFF) executive reports RSU grant, vesting and tax withholding
feed.summary: INTERNATIONAL FLAVORS & FRAGRANCES INC executive Andres Roberto Muller reported receiving a grant of 12,402 Restricted Stock Units (RSUs) that will vest in three annual tranches starting April 1, 2027. On the same day, 2,583 previously granted RSUs vested and were exercised into common stock at $72.57 per share, with 759 shares withheld for tax purposes. Following these transactions, Muller holds 3,016 shares of common stock and 21,219 RSUs.

feed.title: Director at Target (NYSE: TGT) receives 1,791-share equity award
feed.summary: Target Corporation director Stephen B. Bratspies was granted an equity award of 1,791 shares of common stock, reported via a Form 4 filing. These shares were awarded at $0.00 per share as compensation under the company's 2020 Long-Term Incentive Plan, increasing his direct holdings to 1,791 shares. This transaction is categorized as a compensation grant rather than a market purchase, aligning the director's interests with long-term company performance.

feed.title: Certara (CERT) executive exercises 10,849 RSUs, uses 2,642 shares for tax withholding
feed.summary: Certara, Inc. executive Adrian McKemey exercised 10,849 restricted stock units (RSUs) on April 1, 2026. In connection with this vesting, 2,642 shares were withheld for tax obligations at a value of $5.70 per share, which is an exempt non-market transaction under Rule 16b-3. After these transactions, McKemey directly holds 8,207 common shares and has 21,698 unvested RSUs remaining.

feed.title: BNY Mellon (NYSE: BK) director granted 227 phantom stock units
feed.summary: BNY Mellon director Sandra O'Connor received 227.329 phantom stock units, valued at $120.97 per share, as stock-based compensation under the company's Deferred Compensation Plan for Directors. These units are payable in common stock shares at a future date. Following this grant, O'Connor's total common stock-related holdings in the company amount to 6,899.1906 shares-equivalent.

feed.title: First Busey Corp (BUSE) director awarded 2,865 deferred stock units
feed.summary: First Busey Corp director Jennifer M. Grigsby was granted 2,865 deferred stock units, which vest after one year, as part of her routine compensation. This transaction is noted as a board grant and not an open-market purchase or sale. Following this award, Grigsby directly holds 24,740 shares of First Busey common stock, with an additional 25,637 shares held indirectly through a living trust.

feed.title: [Form 4] Certara, Inc. Insider Trading Activity
feed.summary: Certara, Inc.'s SVP and General Counsel, Daniel Corcoran, exercised 10,849 restricted stock units (RSUs) on April 1, 2026, as part of his equity-based compensation. Of these, 5,751 shares were withheld at $5.70 each to cover tax obligations. After the transaction, Corcoran directly holds 21,319 common shares, with remaining RSUs scheduled to vest on April 1, 2027, and April 1, 2028.

feed.title: Regeneron (REGN) director Ryan sells $77,727 in stock
feed.summary: Regeneron Pharmaceuticals Inc (NASDAQ:REGN) director Arthur F. Ryan sold 96 shares of company stock for $77,727 on April 1, 2026. The sales were made pursuant to a Rule 10b5-1(c) trading plan. The biotechnology giant, which remains undervalued and has a "GREAT" financial health score, also recently announced a collaboration with TriNetX and received FDA approval for extended dosing intervals for its EYLEA HD treatment.

feed.title: Director at Bank of New York Mellon (NYSE: BK) gets stock award
feed.summary: Elizabeth Robinson, a director at Bank of New York Mellon (NYSE: BK), received an equity-based award of 87.8320 phantom stock units, each valued at $120.97. This award, granted under the company's Deferred Compensation Plan for Directors, means she now holds 5,320.2922 shares-related units. Phantom stock provides benefits of ownership without actual shares, payable in common stock at a future date.

feed.title: International Flavors & Fragrances (NYSE: IFF) EVP gains RSUs and covers taxes with shares
feed.summary: Stephen N. Landsman, EVP and General Counsel at International Flavors & Fragrances (IFF), reported receiving a grant of 15,158 Restricted Stock Units (RSUs) and the vesting of 3,228 RSUs on April 1, 2026. To cover taxes, 1,164 shares were withheld from the vested amount. Following these transactions, Landsman directly holds 17,164 common shares and 24,844 RSUs, with new RSU tranches vesting in 2027, 2028, and 2029.

feed.title: Director Jeffrey Goldstein awarded phantom stock at Bank of New York Mellon (BK)
feed.summary: Jeffrey A. Goldstein, a director at Bank of New York Mellon (BK), was awarded 340.994 phantom stock units on April 1, 2026, under the company's Deferred Compensation Plan for Directors. These units are valued at $120.97 per share and will be settled in common stock at a specified future date. Following this award, Goldstein's direct holdings in the company increased to 42,308.4108 common shares.

feed.title: [Form 4] INTERNATIONAL FLAVORS & FRAGRANCES INC Insider Trading Activity
feed.summary: INTERNATIONAL FLAVORS & FRAGRANCES INC EVP and CFO Michael DeVeau reported routine equity compensation activity, including the grant of 16,536 Restricted Stock Units (RSUs) and the vesting of 4,735 previously granted RSUs, which converted into common stock. Following tax withholdings, Mr. DeVeau directly holds 12,912.572 shares of common stock and 26,476 RSUs. This Form 4 filing details compensation-related transactions rather than open-market buying or selling of IFF stock.

feed.title: Certara (CERT) CFO adds 50,605 shares from RSU and PSU vesting plus grant
feed.summary: Certara, Inc. CFO John E. Gallagher reported significant equity transactions on April 1, 2026, stemming from the vesting of restricted stock units (RSUs) and performance stock units (PSUs), along with a new share grant. He acquired a total of 50,605 common shares through vesting and received an additional 23,346 shares as a grant. Following these transactions and the disposition of 25,108 shares for tax withholding, Gallagher directly owns 95,371 shares of Certara common stock.

feed.title: Colgate-Palmolive (CL) director Norrington defers retainer into 294-share award
feed.summary: Colgate-Palmolive (CL) director Lorrie M. Norrington received an equity award of 294 shares of common stock, valued at $89.05 per share. This award is a result of deferring a portion of her annual cash retainer into a stock unit account. Following this transaction, Norrington's direct holdings in Colgate-Palmolive have increased to 40,160 shares.

feed.title: Director Rod Brenneman granted 2,865 stock units at First Busey (BUSE)
feed.summary: First Busey director Rod Brenneman was granted 2,865 Deferred Stock Units, which vest after one year. This grant, valued at $0 per unit, increases his direct holdings to 32,674 shares of Common Stock. Additionally, he indirectly holds 136,639 shares of Common Stock and 100 shares of Series A Non-Cumulative Perpetual Preferred Stock through a living trust.

feed.title: Generac (GNRC) CEO Jagdfeld sells 5,000 shares under Rule 10b5-1 plan
feed.summary: Generac Holdings Inc. CEO Aaron Jagdfeld sold 5,000 shares of common stock at an average price of $199.81 per share on April 1, 2026. This transaction was executed under a pre-arranged Rule 10b5-1(c) trading plan adopted on December 4, 2025. After the sale, Jagdfeld directly holds 574,528 shares, indicating the sale represents a small fraction of his total equity.

feed.title: Director Maurice S. Smith receives 457 Ventas (NYSE: VTR) stock units as fees
feed.summary: Ventas, Inc. director Maurice S. Smith was granted 457.261 common stock units on April 1, 2026, as director fees under the company's Non-Employee Directors' Cash Compensation Deferral Plan. The units, valued at $82.01 per share, are payable solely in common stock. Following this transaction, Smith directly holds a total of 28,549.613 Ventas common shares.

feed.title: Ventas (NYSE: VTR) director awarded 381 shares under fee deferral plan
feed.summary: Ventas, Inc. director Sumit Roy was awarded 381.051 shares of common stock on April 1, 2026, under the company’s Non-Employee Directors' Cash Compensation Deferral Plan. These shares were granted in lieu of cash director fees, with each share valued at $82.01. Following this transaction, Roy directly holds a total of 22,240.765 shares of Ventas common stock.

feed.title: Target Corp (TGT) director Stephen Bratspies files Form 3 insider report
feed.summary: Target Corp director Stephen B. Bratspies has filed a Form 3 insider ownership report for TGT, indicating his new role as a director. The filing shows no reported transactions, exercises, gifts, or other movements in Target securities. A Form 3 is an initial statement of beneficial ownership, meaning it reports his entry into the role and not any stock activity.

feed.title: Certara (CERT) HR chief nets 11,883 shares after RSU vesting and tax withholding
feed.summary: Certara, Inc.'s Chief Human Resources Officer, Rona Anhalt, acquired 11,883 shares after exercising 9,764 restricted stock units (RSUs) and settling tax obligations. This transaction, revealed in a Form 4 filing, involved 3,062 shares being withheld for taxes. The vesting represents one-third of an RSU grant from May 20, 2025, with the remaining two-thirds scheduled to vest in 2027 and 2028.

feed.title: Colgate-Palmolive (CL) director defers retainer into 210-share stock grant
feed.summary: Colgate-Palmolive director Brian Newman received a grant of 210 shares of Common Stock valued at $89.05 per share on April 1, 2026. This grant resulted from deferring a portion of his annual cash retainer into a stock unit account under the Deferred Compensation Plan for Non-Employee Directors. Following this transaction, Newman directly holds 5,534 shares of CL, with an additional 36 shares held indirectly through a family trust.

feed.title: MetLife (MET) director Laura J. Hay granted 721 deferred shares as board fees
feed.summary: MetLife director Laura J. Hay received a grant of 721 deferred shares of common stock as part of her non-management director compensation, valued at $71.17 per share. This is a routine, compensation-related award, not an open-market purchase, and increases her direct holdings to 5,692 shares. Hay elected to defer the receipt of these shares under MetLife's Deferred Compensation Plan for Non-Management Directors.

feed.title: [Form 4] METLIFE INC Insider Trading Activity
feed.summary: MetLife Inc. director Denise M. Morrison reported the acquisition of 721 shares of MetLife common stock on April 1, 2026, as part of her non-management director compensation. These shares were granted at $0.00 per share, reflecting stock-based fees rather than a market purchase. Following this award, Morrison directly holds 34,711 shares of MetLife common stock, a transaction indicating routine equity compensation aligned with company policy.

feed.title: MetLife (NYSE: MET) director granted 1,248 deferred shares as fees
feed.summary: MetLife Inc. director Robert Glenn Hubbard was granted 1,248 deferred shares of common stock, valued at $71.17 per share, as part of his non-management director compensation. These shares represent retainer fees paid in stock, which Hubbard elected to defer. Following this transaction, his direct holdings in MetLife common stock increased to 105,878 shares.
